name: componentry-pixel-canvas
title: Pixel Canvas
author: Harsh Jadhav
description: Lights a canvas pixel grid around pointer or touch input with configurable trail and glow behavior.

changes: Repointed the utility import; replaced mouse and touch listeners with pointer events; fixed transform accumulation; bounded pixel density, decay, DPR, and render size; paused while hidden or offscreen; added accessible naming and a static reduced-motion frame.

modifications.change: Repointed the utility import; replaced mouse and touch listeners with pointer events; fixed transform accumulation; bounded pixel density, decay, DPR, and render size; paused while hidden or offscreen; added accessible naming and a static reduced-motion frame.
modifications.reason: Keep the interactive pixel field responsive and bounded across touch, resize, high-DPR, and reduced-motion conditions.
